ddls:
CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the title */,
  "title_type" TEXT /* Type of the title (e.g., TV, movie, OVA) */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the title */,
  "episode_count" INTEGER /* Number of episodes in the title */,
  "airing_dates" TEXT /* Airing dates of the title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the title */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the title (e.g., airing, finished, upcoming) */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the title */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the title */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the popularity of the title */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the cover image for the title */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the trailer for the title */,
  "source_material" TEXT /* Source material of the title (e.g., manga, light novel) */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Detailed synopsis of the title */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the title (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the genre is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "title_genres" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "airing_date" TEXT /* Airing date of the episode */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the episode */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image for the episode */,
  "is_special" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the episode is a special episode (e.g., OVA, special event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_titles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user to the title */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user for the title */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the title is a favorite of the user */,
  "watch_status" TEXT /* Current watch status (e.g., watching, completed, on hold, dropped) */,
  "last_watched_episode" INTEGER /* ID of the last episode watched by the user */,
  "rewatch_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has rewatched the title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is anonymous */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who gave the rating (for monitoring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is anonymous */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who wrote the review (for monitoring) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the staff member is involved in */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., director, screenwriter) */,
  "is_lead" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the staff member is a lead in their role */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_staff_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_actors" (
  "voice_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice actor */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the voice actor is involved in */,
  "voice_actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the voice actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character voiced by the voice actor */,
  "is_lead" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the voice actor is a lead voice actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the voice actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voice_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_actors_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the studio is involved in */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the studio was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the studio's official website */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the studio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studios_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title being followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "title_followers" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anime_manga" (
  "anime_manga_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anime or manga */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the anime or manga is related to */,
  "anime_manga_type" TEXT /* Type of the anime or manga (e.g., anime, manga) */,
  "anime_manga_name" TEXT /* Name of the anime or manga */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the anime or manga */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the anime or manga (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anime_manga_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anime_manga_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequels_prequels" (
  "sequel_prequel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequel or prequel */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the sequel or prequel is related to */,
  "sequel_prequel_type" TEXT /* Type of the sequel or prequel (e.g., sequel, prequel) */,
  "sequel_prequel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequel or prequel */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the sequel or prequel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sequel or prequel (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequel_prequel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequels_prequels_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spin_offs" (
  "spin_off_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spin-off */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the title the spin-off is related to */,
  "spin_off_name" TEXT /* Name of the spin-off */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the spin-off */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the spin-off (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spin_off_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spin_offs_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES titles ("title_id")
)
